items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
👄Dior New TOUJOURS Handbag, this Dior Toujours handbag debuted at the Spring/Summer 2023 show, featuring a casual and practical design. Crafted from imported calfskin, it is detailed with oversized houndstooth quilting. The spacious interior features a pocket for neatly organizing daily essentials. It features a leather strap closure and a CD Lock letter D turn-lock closure, with adjustable sides to elevate the style. Large size, leather handle with adjustable details, can be carried by hand or on the shoulder. CD Lock and strap closure, D.I.O.R. charm, detachable inner pouch, adjustable leather handle, includes dust bag! Model: M1188L, Dimensions: 37 x 20 x 28.5 cm, Handle Length: 14 - 29 cm.

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
Monogram Latest Trend Origami Magic Bag
Classic monogram paired with dark brown calfskin, full of a premium feel. Eight hidden magnetic closures allow the handbag to cleverly transform into a tote bag or fold into an Origami (origami) style bucket bag. A bag for two ways to carry is amazing! Transformable tote, transformable bucket~ There are three sizes to meet our different needs for bag capacity. The more you look, the more you like it.
Large model: 0894. 32.5cmx32.5cmx27.5cm

items.name_en: Large
items.name_cn:
Large
[Balenciaga] New Crush Tote "Trash Bag", perfectly combining the Trash Bag shape with Crush elements. The wrinkled texture highlights the excellent touch. Soft washed denim and sheep leather ➕ paired with silver vintage hardware ➕ drawstring closure ➕ bold logo print. Compared to the 22bag, the real item is lighter, and cowhide is more wear-resistant than sheepskin. It captures the essence of the "Trash Bag" better than Chanel. It is a definitely large-capacity bucket bag where items can be easily thrown in. The drawstring design is this year's fashion trend; just pull gently to gather the opening. The chain design allows for hand carry, shoulder carry, or underarm carry, as well as crossbody tote, etc. Casual and unconstrained is the attitude this bag should have ✔️
Style No.: BG0305, Large Size: Length 39.8 x Height 45.9 x Width 13.9cm; Small Size: Length 23.8 x Height 25.9 x Width 9.9cm.

specs.rawTitle:

MIUMIU Long Handle Baguette Bag
Recently inspired by the trendy long-handle baguette design. The 24 Fall/Winter new arrival revolves around a 'girlish sentiment' with a scholarly vibe. It embodies an uninhibited and elegant young lady's attitude and a casual outlook on life, unique to Miu Miu girls. Not too big or small, just right. Sweet, spicy, or cool. The capacity meets daily needs. Good-looking and practical. Hard not to love it.
Size: Base 28×8×16cm
